name: Aquaria
description: Aquaria is a side-scrolling action-adventure game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Objective
options.description: **Kill the Creator:** Get to the final boss (the Creator) and beat all it's forms.

choices.label: Obtain Secrets And Kill The Creator

options.label: Mini Bosses To Beat
options.description: The number of minibosses to beat before having access to the goal.

options.label: Big Bosses To Beat
options.description: The number of big bosses to beat before having access to the creator (the final boss).

options.label: Turtle Randomizer
options.description: Randomize the transportation turtle.

options.label: Early Energy Form
options.description: Force the Energy form to be in a location early in the multiworld (or directly in your world if Early and Local is selected).

options.label: Early Bind Song
options.description: Force the Bind song to be in a location early in the multiworld (or directly in your world if Early and Local is selected).

options.label: Light Needed To Get To Dark Places
options.description: Make sure that the sun form or the dumbo pet can be acquired before getting to dark places.

options.label: Bind Song Needed To Get Under Rock Bulb
options.description: Make sure that the bind song can be acquired before having to obtain sing bulbs under rocks.

options.label: Unconfine Home Water
options.description: Open the way out of the Home Waters area so that Naija can go to open water and beyond without the bind song.

options.label: Ingredient Randomizer
options.description: Select if the simple ingredients (that do not have a recipe) should be randomized.

options.label: Dish Randomizer
options.description: Randomize the drop of Dishes (Ingredients with recipe).

options.label: Aquarian Translation
options.description: Translate the Aquarian scripture in the game into English.

options.label: Skip First Vision
options.description: Skip the first vision in the game, where Naija transforms into Energy Form and gets flooded by enemies.

options.label: Blind Goal
options.description: Hide the goal's requirements from the help page so that you don't know what is needed to goal.

options.label: Infinite Hot Soup
options.description: As soon as a "hot soup" is received, the user will never run out of this dish.

options.label: Open Body Tongue
options.description: Remove the body tongue making the body accessible without going in the sunken city

options.label: Maximum Ingredient Amount
options.description: The maximum number of the same ingredients that can be stacked on the ingredient inventory.

options.label: Skip Final Boss 3Rd Form
options.description: The Final boss third form (the hide and seek form) can be easy and quite long.

options.label: Save Healing
options.description: When you save, Naija is healed back to full health.

options.label: Throne As Location
options.description: If enabled, sitting on the Mithalas City Castle throne (with the seal on it) will be a location and opening the door to the Mithalas Cathedral will be an item.

options.label: No Progression Hard Or Hidden Locations
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items at hard-to-reach or hard-to-find locations.

options.label: No Progression Simon Says
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the says area.

options.label: No Progression Kelp Forest
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in Kelp Forest (excluding Simon says area).

options.label: No Progression Veil
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Veil.

options.label: No Progression Mithalas
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Mithalas (city, castle and cathedral).

options.label: No Progression Energy Temple
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Energy Temple.

options.label: No Progression Arnassi Ruins
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Arnassi Ruins.

options.label: No Progression Frozen Veil
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Frozen Veil (including Ice Cavern and Bubble Cave).

options.label: No Progression Abyss
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Abyss.

options.label: No Progression Sunken City
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Sunken City.

options.label: No Progression Body
options.description: Make sure that there are no progression items in the Body (including the before-boss transturtle room and the boss location).
